priority_findings.explanation: Centre C2 averaged 98.6% of aggregate target across cycles while Tier-1 programme PRG-002 averaged only 82.1% fulfilment. The aggregate number conceals this.

cascade_claims.explanation: Green leafy vegetables for programme PRG-002 (Tier 1 - Critical) at C3 depends on AgroFresh Vegetables, whose pressure-adjusted reliability at this volume is 47% (naive average looks like 82%).
2 programmes at C4 draw from the same stock pool 'Fortified rice' (2300kg claimed vs 4200kg available). Supply covers both claims — reservations locked per programme before production starts.
2 programmes at C5 draw from the same stock pool 'Rice (standard)' (5500kg claimed vs 11100kg available). Supply covers both claims — reservations locked per programme before production starts.

escalation_cards.explanation: Centre C2 averaged 98.6% of aggregate target across cycles while Tier-1 programme PRG-002 averaged only 82.1% fulfilment. The aggregate number conceals this.
escalation_cards.recommended_action: Review shared-equipment/line allocation policy for this centre; current default is starving a Tier 1 programme across multiple cycles.

escalation_cards.explanation: 46000 meals required vs 42000 capacity (110% of ceiling).
escalation_cards.recommended_action: Shift ~4000 meals of steady-state load to C4 (forecast utilisation 15%)

escalation_cards.explanation: Green leafy vegetables for programme PRG-002 (Tier 1 - Critical) at C3 depends on AgroFresh Vegetables, whose pressure-adjusted reliability at this volume is 47% (naive average looks like 82%).
escalation_cards.recommended_action: Pre-emptively source from a backup supplier or reduce today's committed volume now — do not wait for the delivery window.
